name: Pi Zero 2 W kiosk (Chromium → sinsera.co/ark)
description: Pi OS Lite (Bookworm 64-bit) with Chromium auto-launching https://sinsera.co/ark/ in fullscreen kiosk mode on HDMI. Targets Pi Zero 2 W. Same two-phase install pattern as sinsera-kiosk; Chromium runs but slowly on a single-core A53 / 416 MB RAM, so first paint of the Ark UI is ~10-20 s after each boot.

preconfigured.user: kiosk_admin (no password — SSH-key only, sudo NOPASSWD)
preconfigured.kiosk_user: kiosk (auto-login on tty1, runs openbox + chromium --kiosk)
